preToolUse.powershell: if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash .github/hooks/guard-destructive-shell.sh } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash, Git Bash, or WSL is required to run .github/hooks/guard-destructive-shell.sh on Windows."}' }

if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash .github/hooks/guard-secret-paths.sh } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash, Git Bash, or WSL is required to run .github/hooks/guard-secret-paths.sh on Windows."}' }

if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash .github/hooks/guard-repository-writes.sh } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash, Git Bash, or WSL is required to run .github/hooks/guard-repository-writes.sh on Windows."}' }

postToolUse.powershell: if (Get-Command bash -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { bash .github/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh } else { Write-Output '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash, Git Bash, or WSL is required to run .github/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh on Windows."}' }
